tasks.title: F.1 Long-term memory layer (pgvector)
tasks.notes: COMPLETE: CustomerMemory model, EmbeddingService, MemoryService, MemoryExtractionJob, AiAutoReplyJob memory recall. Similarity threshold 0.72.

tasks.title: F.2 Multi-turn reasoning + tool calling
tasks.notes: COMPLETE: AiTools::ToolExecutor, ShopifyIntegration, ShiprocketIntegration, tool loop (max 3 iter), confidence tags [CONF:HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW], pending confirmation gate, COT_ADDENDUM. ai_tools_config jsonb column on accounts.

tasks.title: F.3 Emotion-adaptive Senior Agent persona
tasks.notes: Dynamic tone matrix (empathetic/technical/celebratory), customer_profile service tracks sentiment trends

tasks.title: F.4 Self-improving KB (gap detection + auto-merge)
tasks.notes: Diff AI attempt vs human resolution → gap note → auto KB draft. pgvector semantic dedup

tasks.title: F.5 Autonomous Actions (refund/cancel/extend trial)
tasks.notes: Idempotent pre-approved actions, customer confirmation for sensitive ops, audit log

tasks.title: F.6 Predictive support (proactive widget trigger)
tasks.notes: URL pattern + dwell-time rule engine. Auto-intervene on cancellation/billing page

tasks.title: F.7 Multi-agent collaboration (Triage/Tech/Billing)
tasks.notes: Sub-agent prompts per category, internal handoff, specialized KB each

tasks.title: F.8 Cross-Channel Unified Customer Profile
tasks.notes: Omnichannel memory: customer_id (email/phone) as key, conversation summaries across WhatsApp/Messenger/voice/web stored in pgvector. Inject unified context on any channel contact. Reuses F.1 MemoryService infrastructure.

tasks.title: F.9 Shadow Learning — AI learns from human agents
tasks.notes: PARTIALLY BUILT. Shadow Session recorder: captures human agent actions after AI handoff, diffs AI attempt vs human resolution, updates system prompt playbook. All data stays on-server. Needs audit + refinement.

tasks.title: I.1 Full VM snapshot before any UI work
tasks.notes: GCP disk snapshot + DB dump + image export. Tag "pre-ui-overhaul-snapshot"

tasks.title: I.2 Spin up staging VM clone from snapshot
tasks.notes: staging.tamaleapp.com — identical infra, separate DB. UI work tested here first

tasks.title: I.3 Git state cleanup on VM before fork
tasks.notes: VM /home/tamale is detached HEAD with many uncommitted changes (F.1, F.2, all TAMALE patches). Fix: commit all changes to a tamale-production branch, push to GitHub, then proceed to fork. Antigravity local↔VM sync must be verified first.

tasks.title: I.4 Fork Chatwoot → own GitHub repo
tasks.notes: No more upstream pulls blind. Cherry-pick security patches only

tasks.title: I.5 Fork Dograh + bake 8 patches as proper code
tasks.notes: No more Dockerfile sed-patches. Source-level changes survive upstream changes

tasks.title: I.6 Theme abstraction layer (CSS vars + brand tokens)
tasks.notes: Brand tokens in 1 file. Chatwoot updates won't override TAMALE look

tasks.title: I.7 New landing page (distinctive, not generic)
tasks.notes: Bold aesthetic — agency-targeted hero, real screenshots, social proof

tasks.title: I.8 Redesign dashboard shell (sidebar/topbar/spacing)
tasks.notes: Distinctive typography, refined palette, micro-interactions. Section by section

tasks.title: I.9 Blue-green deploy strategy
tasks.notes: New version live on staging → swap nginx upstream → 1-cmd rollback if broken

tasks.title: J.1 JTI replay protection for Voice Studio JWT
tasks.notes: Redis-backed one-time-use enforcement. Defense-in-depth beyond 30s expiry

tasks.title: J.2 2FA (TOTP) for admin + agency accounts
tasks.notes: devise-two-factor gem. Mandatory for owner role

tasks.title: J.3 Audit log for sensitive actions
tasks.notes: Impersonation, refunds, deletions, plan changes, API key views. Immutable append-only

tasks.title: J.4 OWASP Top 10 pen-test (self + external)
tasks.notes: SQLi, XSS, CSRF, IDOR, auth bypass. OWASP ZAP locally

tasks.title: J.5 GDPR / DPDPA data export + deletion API
tasks.notes: User self-serve export (JSON) + delete workflow. Required for India DPDPA

tasks.title: J.6 Granular rate limit tuning (per endpoint, per plan)
tasks.notes: Free vs Pro different limits. Burst allowance. Rack::Attack rules

tasks.title: J.7 Session anomaly detection (new device/IP alerts)
tasks.notes: Email user on suspicious login. Optional auto-block

tasks.title: J.8 Encrypted backups → offsite (S3/GCS)
tasks.notes: Local 6hr backup → push encrypted (age/gpg) to remote bucket nightly

tasks.title: J.9 Postgres point-in-time recovery (WAL archiving)
tasks.notes: Restore to any second within 7 days. Critical "oh shit" lifeline

tasks.title: J.10 Sentry release tracking + source maps
tasks.notes: Tag releases by git SHA → readable stack traces

tasks.title: J.11 Public status page (status.tamaleapp.com)
tasks.notes: BetterStack / Uptime Kuma. Builds trust with agencies

tasks.title: J.12 SLA monitoring + uptime alerts
tasks.notes: SMS + email alert if downtime > 2 min

tasks.title: J.13 Disaster recovery runbook (documented)
tasks.notes: "VM died, what now" + "DB corrupted" + "Dograh broken" procs

tasks.title: J.14 Container vulnerability scanning (Trivy)
tasks.notes: Weekly scan all 11 containers. Auto-PR for base image updates

tasks.title: J.15 Secrets rotation policy + automation
tasks.notes: Quarterly rotation of OSS_JWT_SECRET, webhook secrets, API keys

tasks.title: J.16 Cloudflare WAF + DDoS protection
tasks.notes: Free tier protects against volumetric attacks + bot mitigation

tasks.title: J.17 Dependency security audit in CI
tasks.notes: bundler-audit + npm audit blocks PRs with known CVEs

tasks.title: J.18 Customer-facing API tokens scope-limited
tasks.notes: Read-only vs full-access tokens. Revoke UI. Last-used timestamp
